notes: Calibrated by backend.scripts.calibrate_slo_baseline --window 720 --apply against simulation_jobs (975 rows over 2026-05-02~05-23 span). Wave 1 tables (candidate_lineage / ops_audit_log) created empty by init_schema during calibration — vlm/delivery/pre_render baselines fall back to floors until those pipelines backfill. baseline_provenance is REQUIRED for load_default_thresholds (fail-closed in prod, warning in SLO_TEST_MODE). paused_stale_days controls Wave 4 W4-2 stop-loss window in days (default 7); baseline_stale_days controls how many days a calibration may stand before baseline_stale SLO violation fires (default 60). Both tunables may be edited without redeploy. Per plan §P2.4 + Wave 3 Agent C eval-auditor C-2 + Wave 4 W4-1 + Wave 5/6/7 followup.
